<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get fees for a settlement"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/settlements/{id}/fees"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Get fee line items and summary for a settlement in the Account.

    ### Permissions
    * `settlement:read`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
